speaker: speaker1
text: Come in , come in , what can I do for you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Professor Donald , are you giving your advanced geology course again next semester ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , I am applying on it .

speaker: speaker2
text: I wonder if I could enroll in it . I know it is a graduate course and I ' m a junior , but ...

speaker: speaker1
text: Aren't you a bit young ? I have a lot of qualified seniors to take the course and they usually have a hard time keeping up .

speaker: speaker2
text: I know , but geology of the American west is my major interest and I have done a large reading in the field .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , if you think you are ready , I'll let you enroll .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , thanks , professor Donald . This is really very nice of you .
